intro: Between April 13 and April 22, 2026, ZCyberNews published eight articles tracking backdoor threats. The coverage detailed activity from distinct threat actors APT41, Harvester, and Mustang Panda, primarily targeting the banking, cloud-services, government, and technology sectors. Incidents were reported globally, with notable focus on India, South Asia, and South Korea. The severity of these threats was significant, with seven reports classified as high and one as critical.
